title: Task System
description: A file-persisted task graph tracks status, ownership, and blockedBy dependencies.

steps.content: Break the release into tasks and block deployment until tests pass.
steps.annotation: The user asks for durable multi-step coordination.
Tasks are created as JSON files under .tasks/.
The claim fails until dependencies are complete.
The task graph prevents premature work.
Completing a dependency can unblock downstream tasks.
The harness reports newly available work.
